headline: Trump-Iran HELLFIRE 🔥👹 Strait Shutdown OIL SPIKE ⛽💥
text:
MAGA DADDY 🍊👑 Trump dropping ULTIMATUM BOMBS 💣📜 on Iran mullahs 🕌😡 – 'MAKE A DEAL OR ALL HELL RAINS DOWN 🌩️👹💦!' Tehran ayatollahs 🧔🔥 clapping back like salty kebab kings 🥙😤: 'REGION TURNS INTO HELL PIT 🔥🕳️ if US-Israel cowboys 🤠🇺🇸🇮🇱 keep escalating!' Strait of Hormuz LOCKED 🚪⛴️ spiking oil prices ⛽📈 like Elon’s Tesla pump 🚀😂 – Friday F-15 Eagle 🦅✈️ SHOT DOWN 💥 over southern Iran, pilot rescued 🆙👨‍✈️ but airman MIA 😱🔍, Iranians offering REWARDS 🤑🎁 for 'alive' capture like twisted Pokémon hunt 📱🐾!

A-10 Warthog 🐗💥 got ZAPPED in SAR mission but pilot bailed safe 🪂👍 – Trump pausing energy plant BBQ 🔥🏭 for 10 days ⏳🤝 to 'deal or no Hormuz reopen!' Truth Social RANT 📱🔥: '48 HOURS OR HELL REIGNS 👹👑!' Iranian spokesman Zolfaghari spilling TEA ☕😈: 'Your defeat illusion = QUAGMIRE SINK 🐸💩!' Saturday missile BARRAGE 🚀💥 – Iran yeeting at Gulf states 🏝️🇮🇶🇮🇱, intercepted debris raining CHAOS 🪂🏚️💥!

Trump posts 'MASSIVE Tehran STRIKE VID' 🎥💣 claiming mullah generals TERMINATED 🪦⚰️ like bad Apprentice rejects 😂📺 – but vid’s 24HR OLD FAKEOUT 🤥🕰️, no Tehran clapback 🤐! Israel BOOMING Iranian petrochemical HUB 🏭💥 in Mahshahr – 5 DEAD ☠️ 170 HURT 😵‍💫, used for explosive TOYS 🎆🔫! Bushehr NUCLEAR PLANT ⚛️🏭 HIT 4TH TIME 😱 – worker KAPUT 💀, Russia dipping OUT evacuating 198 peeps 🛫🇷🇺 like Rosatom boss Likhachev yelling 'BYE FELICIA' 👋🚀!

IAEA UN watchdogs 😟📋 'DEEP CONCERN' over nuke strike 🚫⚠️ – NO RADIATION LEAK ☢️✅ but 'NEVER ATTACK PLANTS' 🙏🛡️, max restraint or BOOMTOWN 🌋💥! Iran shrugs 'main bits FINE 😎🔧' but blames US-Israel tag team 👊🇺🇸🇮🇱. War kicked off Feb 28 📅💥 post Geneva nuke talks flop 🗣️🚫 – sanctions hell since forever 😩⛓️! Jerusalem explosions BOOM 💥🕍, Iran keeps firing at Iraq-Gulf 🚀🏜️ – OIL ORGY ⛽💦 or WW3 HELLGATE? 👹🌍 Trump vs Persians: WHO BLINKS FIRST? 😈👀‼️
